accurate.why: Accurately describes the disapproval, the reclassification to endangered species status, and the Fed. Reg. citation.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the endangered species reclassification context is accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as a CRA disapproval nullifying the FWS northern long-eared bat rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly states the rule shall have no force or effect.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers disapproval, rule content, Fed. Reg. cite, and operative effect.

concise.why: Appropriately brief and to the point.

correct_entities.why: U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service, ESA, and CRA correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 87 Federal Register 73488, November 30, 2022, and May 11, 2023 all match bill text.
